name: Popcorn: Buttered Pecan Popcorn
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Popped popcorn (about 1/3 to 1/2 cup unpopped)
1/4 cup Instant butter pecan pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard any unpopped popcorn kernels.
2. Spray a 17 x 12 x 2-inch roasting pan with nonstick spray.
3. Place the popped corn and pecans in the pan.
4. Keep the popcorn warm in a 300-degree oven for 16 minutes, stirring halfway through baking.
5. Remove the pan from the oven.
6. Turn the mixture onto a large piece of foil.
7. Allow the popcorn to cool completely.
8. When cooled, break into large pieces.
9. Store leftover popcorn, tightly covered, in a cool, dry place for up to 1 week.
10. Makes about 9 (1 cup) servings.
NUTRITION FACTS PER SERVING: 157 cal., 7 g total fat (0 g sat. fat), 0 mg chol., 116 mg sodium, 22 g carbs, 1 g fiber, 2 g protein. Daily Value: 3% vit. A, 0% vit.C, 1% calcium, 5% iron.
Source: Better Homes and Gardens, January 1993
